description_long: This is a modern L-shaped outdoor chaise constructed with a woven rattan or synthetic wicker frame in a dark gray color. The seating area is topped with thick, light beige cushions that cover both the seat and the backrest, providing comfort and a contemporary look. The chaise features a left-side extended lounge section, allowing for both sitting and reclining positions. The backrest is segmented into three distinct cushion sections, each matching the seat cushions in color and material. Both ends of the chaise have wide, boxy armrests that are integrated into the frame, giving the piece a sturdy and substantial appearance. The overall design is clean, minimalistic, and suitable for urban patios, parks, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped outdoor chaise with a dark woven frame and thick light beige cushions, featuring wide armrests and a segmented backrest. The design is clean and comfortable, ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, and both wide armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the left-side lounge extension, and the thickness of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the woven back panels and the segmentation between the two main seating sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the right armrest and the end of the lounge section.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight and segmented into three large, rectangular cushions that provide full back support. It is of medium height, with no visible curvature or decorative elements, and matches the seat cushions in color and material.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, wide and boxy, integrated into the frame at each end of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are not distinctly visible, as the woven rattan frame extends to the ground, giving the appearance of a solid, box-like base with no separate or decorative legs.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light beige with a smooth, plain surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, one for the main seat and one for the lounge extension, all arranged in a simple, functional layout.
